body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-46340", "cvss": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-770", "name": "Allocation of Resources Without Limits or Throttling"}], "description": "For each non-complete SctpMessage fragment the handler does `fragments.put(streamId, Unpooled.wrappedBuffer(frag, byteBuf))`, wrapping the previous accumulator and the new slice into a *new* CompositeByteBuf every time. After N fragments the accumulator is an N-deep chain of composites, each holding references and component arrays; readableBytes()/getBytes() on the final buffer recurse N levels. There is no limit on N, on total bytes, or on the number of streamIdentifiers an attacker can open (each gets its own map entry). A peer that never sets the `complete` flag can grow this structure indefinitely from tiny 1-byte DATA chunks.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0038, "percentile": 0.30098}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-5xrh-qmmq-w6ch", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-08T23:02:33Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5xrh-qmmq-w6ch", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-5xrh-qmmq-w6ch"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-46340"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-12T15:16:27Z", "published_at": "2026-06-08T23:02:33Z", "references": ["https://github.com/netty/netty/security/advisories/GHSA-5xrh-qmmq-w6ch", "https://github.com/netty/netty/releases/tag/netty-4.1.135.Final", "https://github.com/netty/netty/releases/tag/netty-4.2.15.Final", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-46340", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5xrh-qmmq-w6ch"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/netty/netty/security-advisories/GHSA-5xrh-qmmq-w6ch", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/netty/netty", "summary": "Netty: SCTP reassembly nests buffers without bound", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-12T19:29:39Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-5xrh-qmmq-w6ch", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "4.2.15.Final", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "io.netty:netty-transport-sctp"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 4.2.0.Final, <= 4.2.14.Final"}, {"first_patched_version": "4.1.135.Final", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "io.netty:netty-transport-sctp"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 4.1.134.Final"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
